defect: glove class wrong or test date expired (ID from stamp)
prompt: Identify the safety hazards, their severity, and the immediate controls required.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is High-voltage safety, part of the Automotive & Powertrain scope. The observed field condition is: glove class wrong or test date expired (ID from stamp). The work is actively in progress. Reference material on hand: OEM HV procedures, NFPA 70E-adjacent.
title: Hazard check: High-voltage safety (service call)
